rulings.Case Title: PENELOPE ROBINSON VS. ROBYN KAUFMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order To Reconsider Ruling Of Judge Mahoney On Deft'S Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, FEBRUARY 4, 2008 LINE 9. PLAINTIFF PENELOPE ROBINSON'S Motion For Order To Reconsider Ruling Of Judge Mahoney On DEFENDANT'S Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 1281.4, THE ACTION WAS STAYED PENDING THE RULING ON THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THE COURT NEEDED TO FIRST ADDRESS THE ARBITRATION ISSUE BEFORE CONSIDERING THE MERITS OF THE DEMURRER. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: IAN JENSEN et al VS. MARIE DUGGAN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, FEBRUARY 4, 2008 LINE 16. DEFENDANTS MARIE DUGGAN, JOHN DUGGAN, ORGINAL JOE'S, INC. AND CAROL ROHAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO WHETHER A LANDLORD-TENANT RELATIONSHIP EXISTED. BECAUSE DEFENDANT DID NOT FOLLOW PROCEDURES UNDER THE RENT ORDINANCE, THIS DISPUTE OF FACT PRECLUDES GRANTING SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT COULD HAVE GIVEN THE REQUISITE NOTICE UNDER SECTIONS 37.9 (A)(7), OR (A)(10) OR (A) 4 OF THE ORDINANCE. THE NOTICE OF AUGUST 15, 2006 DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE RENT ORDINANCE. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO GOOD FAITH RELATED TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 47. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: ROBERT P HOLLAND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Confirming Award Of Arbitrator & To Enter Judgment Thereon;Petition For Order
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, FEBRUARY 4, 2008 LINE 12. PETITIONERS ROBERT HOLLAND AND DENISE HOLLAND'S Motion For Order Confirming Award Of Arbitrator & To Enter Judgment Thereon IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 26, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE OPPOSING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE ANOTHER SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)
